articles.title: Rob Key: England Test team is not a 'national embarrassment'
articles.description: Managing director won't rule out sacking Stokes following incident in Chelsea nightclub

articles.title: Taskin, Mustafizur set up famous series win for Bangladesh
articles.description: Australia crashed to 0 for 3 and despite a century stand from Labuschagne and Bartlett, the home side came out comfortable winners

articles.title: India-born Nikhil Chaudhary called into Australia T20I squad
articles.description: Former Punjab allrounder Chaudhary replaces Travis Head for Bangladesh T20Is after three excellent seasons with Hurricanes in the BBL

articles.title: Keith Piper, Warwickshire's treble-winning wicketkeeper, dies aged 56
articles.description: Piper claimed more than 500 catches in a 200-match first-class career, and was integral to treble-winning season in 1994

articles.title: Stokes, Atkinson omitted from second Test as Root steps up as interim captain
articles.description: England name Jofra Archer and Jordan Cox in rejigged squad after nightclub incident

articles.title: Lord's pitch rated as 'unsatisfactory' following England's first Test win
articles.description: ICC also hands out demerit point to Gadaffi Stadium for third ODI between Pakistan and Australia

articles.title: Suthar's debut six-for powers India to their biggest Test win
articles.description: After Suthar helped skittle Afghanistan for 152 in their first innings, Washington Sundar and Kuldeep Yadav sealed the win

articles.title: Tamim Iqbal elected new BCB president
articles.description: The former Bangladesh captain will serve a four-year term, having already completed two months as the president of an ad-hoc committee

articles.title: BBL explainer: what does the Melbourne merger mean, and what happens next?
articles.description: After a wild week for the BBL there remains significant uncertainty with a key vote to shape the future later this month

articles.title: Bangladesh announce squads for T20Is vs Australia & one-off Test vs Zimbabwe
articles.description: Bangladesh have already wrapped up the 50-over series, leading 2-0 with one game left.

articles.title: Zak Crawley takes break from red-ball cricket, set to be announced Sunrisers Leeds' captain
articles.description: Kent revealed that the decision to rest Crawley was taken in consultation with the England and Wales Cricket Board (ECB).

articles.title: 2027 Men's ODI World Cup to run from October 4 to November 21 across South Africa, Zimbabwe and Namibia
articles.description: South Africa is likely to host the majority of the tournament, staging at least 41 of the 54 matches across eight venues.

articles.title: 'I learnt as much in a month at WPL as my whole career' - Lauren Bell shares experience of playing at RCB
articles.description: Lauren Bell was one of the architects of Royal Challengers Bengaluru's (RCB) triumph in the Women's Premier League (WPL) earlier this year.
